prestazioni: Engine swap to a Mercedes-Benz M177 3.0L twin-turbo V6 (OM642 engine code) with a custom ECU calibration by AEM Infinity 8, paired with a Garrett GTX4202R turbocharger and a custom intercooler setup from CSF Racing, achieving 550whp on 93 octane fuel

Full drivetrain reinforcement including a Quaife ATB differential for the front axle, a custom 4.88 gear ratio setup from Revolution Gear & Axle, and a heavy-duty transfer case from NV245 HD with a 40% front / 60% rear torque split for improved off-road and on-road handling

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins TTX46 coilovers (custom valved for the Commander’s 5,200 lb weight), paired with Eibach Pro-Truck 2.5-inch lift springs, and a custom sway bar delete kit from Addco for extreme articulation, complemented by Fox 2.0 Performance Series remote-reservoir shocks for the rear
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using a Rocket Bunny Jeep Commander kit (RB-CMD-01), featuring carbon fiber fender flares, a custom front splitter with integrated LED light bar, and a rear diffuser with dual exhaust cutouts for the custom 3.5-inch Borla Atak exhaust system

Full interior rewrap in Alcantara with custom Recaro SR-7 racing seats (modified to fit the Commander’s frame), a custom roll cage by Custom Cages UK (bolt-in design with integrated harness bars), and a digital dash upgrade using a Motec C127 display with custom Jeep-specific CAN bus integration

Exterior lighting overhaul with LUX H8 V4 LED headlights, Diode Dynamics SS3 Max LED fog lights, and a custom rear light setup using Audi R8-style LED taillights (modified to fit the Commander’s tailgate), paired with a custom roof-mounted light bar from Baja Designs (Squadron Pro 50-inch)
